Container.Name: Remuxarr
Container.Overview:
Cleans up a Sonarr/Radarr media library for better playback compatibility without ever re-encoding video. Remuxes containers, drops audio/subtitle tracks outside your kept languages, and fixes broken language metadata — all through lossless stream copying. Video is never touched.
Set your scan paths and preferred languages in Settings after first start. Dry run is on by default, so the first scan shows you exactly what would happen before anything real is touched.
Container.Description: Cleans up a Sonarr/Radarr media library for better playback compatibility without ever re-encoding video. Remuxes containers, drops audio/subtitle tracks outside your kept languages, and fixes broken language metadata — all through lossless stream copying.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent config and database — must survive container updates/restarts

Config.Name: Temp
Config.Description: FFmpeg staging directory — leave under /tmp so it stays RAM-backed

Config.Name: Webhook Debounce Seconds
Config.Description: Seconds to wait after the last Sonarr/Radarr webhook for a file before queuing it. Increase for very large season packs on slow disks.
